title: AGI is FAKE: The Biggest AI Lie Exposed
summary: A YouTube video argues that current AI models face fundamental mathematical ceilings that prevent scaling to AGI. It critiques AGI hype by examining transformer architecture limitations, the Time Hierarchy Theorem, chain-of-thought reasoning failures, and autonomous agent error accumulation.
